texto: Listening to Ella furiously and endlessly unfurl the yarns of the Mingus tales, I understood that the need to tell stories is deeply embedded in our minds, and inseparably entangled with the mechanisms that generate and absorb language. We process the world by telling stories and produce human knowledge through our engagement with imagined selves.

frase_original: I loved you because there was no other place for me to go. We were married because we did not know what else to do with each other. You never knew me, nothing about me, what died inside me, what lived invisibly.

texto: He who recollects a thing by which he was once pleased desires to possess it in the same circumstances as when he first was pleased by it. He who was never pleased is doomed to an eternal hard-on.
explicacao: Citação de Aleksandar Hemon sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “He who recollects a thing by which he was once pleased desires to possess it in the same circumst…” articula reflexao, desires, possess em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como possess.

texto: The writer does not dare dream of giving the best of his individuality. No, he must never express his anger. The vacillating demands of mediocrity must be satisfied. Amuse the people, be their clown, give them platitudes about which they can laugh, shadows of truth which they can hold as truths.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Aleksandar Hemon sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “The writer does not dare dream of giving the best of his individuality. No, he must never express…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, balkan, balkans, útil em momentos de balkans e writers.

texto: When I look at my old pictures, all I can see is what I used to be but am no longer. I think: What I can see is what I am not.
explicacao: Citação de Aleksandar Hemon sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When I look at my old pictures, all I can see is what I used to be but am no longer. I think: Wha…” articula reflexao, vida, photographs em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como photographs e photography.

texto: Still, it was fair to say that the minimum requirement for a truly enjoyable existence would be unbridled promiscuity.

texto: It seemed that we loved each other better when there were large swaths of two continents between us. The daily work of love was often hard to perform at home.
explicacao: Citação de Aleksandar Hemon sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It seemed that we loved each other better when there were large swaths of two continents between …” articula amor, distance, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e love.

texto: While he wanted to teach me what he knew, I wanted him to see what it all looked like for me—perhaps love is a process of finding a common vision of reality.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Aleksandar Hemon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “While he wanted to teach me what he knew, I wanted him to see what it all looked like for me—perh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, love, reality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reality e vision.
